text.title: spatial-ux-fundamentals Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: visionOS productivity app with main editor + ambient clock + recenter.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Productivity app on Vision Pro. Editor window at 1.8 m; tools palette hand-attached; ambient clock in far field.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator + linter exit 0. Spec used as bootstrap brief for RealityKit team.
